{};\n82\t\n83\t  sessionCost.totalInputTextTokens    += details.text_tokens    || 0;\n84\t  sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens   += details.audio_tokens   || 0;\n85\t  sessionCost.totalCachedTokens       += details.cached_tokens  || 0;\n86\t  sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens   += outDetails.text_tokens  || 0;\n87\t  sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens  += outDetails.audio_tokens || 0;\n88\t\n89\t  refreshCostDisplay();\n90\t};\n91\t\n92\tlet costPanelListenerAttached = false;\n93\t\n94\t// Reset cost tracking state (call on reconnect)\n95\tconst resetCostState = () => {\n96\t  sessionCost = {\n97\t    startTime: null,\n98\t    totalInputTextTokens: 0,\n99\t    totalInputAudioTokens: 0,\n100\t    totalOutputTextTokens: 0,\n101\t    totalOutputAudioTokens: 0,\n102\t    totalCachedTokens: hourlyRate, costs, elapsedMs) => {\n113\t  const el = document.getElementById('cost-display');\n114\t  const panel = document.getElementById('cost-panel');\n115\t  if (!el || !panel) return;\n116\t  el.style.display = 'block';\n117\t  panel.style.display = 'block';\n118\t\n119\t  const fmt = (v) => '$' + v.toFixed(2);\n120\t  const mins = Math.floor(elapsedMs / 60000);\n121\t  const secs = Math.floor((elapsedMs % 60000) / 1000);\n122\t  const duration = `${mins}m ${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}s`;\n123\t\n124\t  el.innerHTML = `<button class=\"ducke-btn ducke-btn--xs\">Est. ~${fmt(hourlyRate)}/hr</button>`;\n125\t\n126\t  if (!costPanelListenerAttached) {\n127\t    el.addEventListener('click', () => panel.classList.toggle('open'));\n128\t    costPanelListenerAttached = true;\n129\t  }\n130\t\n131\t  panel.innerHTML = `\n132\t    <div class=\"cost-breakdown\">\n133\t      <div class=\"cost-summary-row\">\n134\t        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Duration</span><span>${duration}</span></div>\n135\t        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Session Total</span><span>${fmt(totalCost)}</span></div>\n136\t        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Model</span><span class=\"cost-val\" style=\"font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.75em\">${typeof APP_MODEL !== 'undefined' ? (ms / 1000).toFixed(2) + 's' : '?';\n177\t  const delta = (a, b) => (a != null && b != null) ? b - a : null;\n178\t\n179\t  const speechDur = delta(p.speechStarted, p.speechStopped);\n180\t  const transcriptionDur = delta(p.speechStopped, p.transcriptionDone);\n181\t  const thinkingDur = delta(p.transcriptionDone ?? p.speechStopped, p.responseCreated);\n182\t\n183\t  const toolSummaries = Object.entries(p.toolCalls).map(([id, tc]) => {\n184\t    const dur = delta(tc.dispatched, tc.resultReceived);\n185\t    return `tool_call(${tc.name ?? id}): ${fmt(dur)}`;\n186\t  });\n187\t\n188\t  const responseDur = (() => {\n189\t    const afterTools = Object.values(p.toolCalls).map(tc => tc.resultReceived).filter(Boolean);\n190\t    const start = afterTools.length > 0 ? Math.max(...afterTools) : p.responseCreated;\n191\t    return delta(start, p.responseDone);\n192\t  })();\n193\t\n194\t  const total = delta(p.speechStarted ?? p.responseCreated, p.responseDone);\n195\t\n196\t  const parts = [\n197\t    `speech: ${fmt(speechDur)}`,\n198\t    `transcription: ${fmt(transcriptionDur)}`,\n199\t    `thinking: ${fmt(thinkingDur)}`,\n200\t    ...toolSummaries,\n201\t    `response: ${fmt(responseDur)}`,\n202\t    `total: ${fmt(total)}`,\n203\t  ];\n204\t  console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] ${parts.join(', ')}`);\n205\t};\n206\t\n207\t// Configure marked for safe rendering\n208\tif (typeof marked !== 'undefined') {\n209\t  marked.setOptions({\n210\t    breaks: true,  // Convert \\n to <br>\n211\t    gfm: true,     // GitHub Flavored Markdown\n212\t    sanitize: false // We trust the content from our backend\n213\t  });\n214\t}\n215\t\n216\t// Load mute state from localStorage\n217\tconst loadMuteState = () => {\n218\t  const localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.Muted, muted.toString());\n225\t};\n226\t\n227\t// Load push-to-talk state from localStorage\n228\tconst loadPushToTalkState = () => {\n229\t  const saved = oauthToken = token;\n247\t      userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr);\n248\t      return true;\n249\t    }\n250\t  } catch (e) {\n251\t    console.error('Failed to load OAuth state:', e);\n252\t  }\n253\t  return false;\n254\t};\n255\t\n256\t// Save OAuth state to localStorage\n257\tconst saveOAuthState = (token, user) => {\n258\t  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN, token);\n259\t null;\n270\t};\n271\t\n272\t// Update login UI based on OAuth state\n273\tconst updateLoginUI = () => {\n274\t  const loginBtn = document.getElementById('login-btn');\n275\t  const userInfoDiv =   loginBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n298\t    }\n299\t    if (userInfoDiv) userInfoDiv.style.display = 'none';\n300\t  }\n301\t};\n302\t\n303\t// Handle OAuth login\n304\tconst handleLogin = () // Add OAuth token if available\n329\t  if (oauthToken) {\n330\t    // We'll pass the token via WebSocket subprotocol or query param\n331\t    // For now, we'll pass it as a query parameter (less updateLayoutMode(false);\n522\t};\n523\t\n524\t// Find message by itemId\n525\tconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n526\t  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n527\t};\n528\t\n529\t// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\n530\tconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n531\t  // Check if already exists\n532\t  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n533\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n534\t    itemId,\n535\t    role,\n536\t    content: '',\n537\t    timestamp: transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n549\t    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n550\t    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n551\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = display\n561\tconst formatToolName = (name) => {\n562\t  const displayNames = {\n563\t    get_current_weather: 'Weather',\n564\t    web_search: 'Web Search',\n565\t    web_fetch: 'Fetch URL',\n566\t    voice_change: 'Voice Change',\n567\t    save_memory: 'Save Memory',\n568\t    recall_memories: 'Recall Memories'\n569\t  };\n570\t  return displayNames[name] || name.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\\b\\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase());\n571\t};\n572\t\n573\t// Add a tool call message to the transcript\n574\tconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n575\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n576\t    role: 'tool',\n577\t    type: 'tool_call',\n578\t    toolName: name,\n579\t    toolArgs: args,\n580\t    callId: callId,\n581\t    status: 'pending',\n582\t function for messages without itemId\n591\tconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n592\t  if (itemId) {\n593\t    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n594\t    if (index !== -1) {\n595\t      // Update existing placeholder\n596\t      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n597\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n598\t      renderTranscript();\n599\t      showTranscript();\n600\t      return;\n601\t    }\n602\t  }\n603\t  // Fallback: add new message\n604\t  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n605\t  renderTranscript();\n606\t  showTranscript();\n607\t};\n608\t\n609\t// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\n610\tconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n611\t  let index;\n612\t  if (itemId) {\n613\t    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n614\t    if (index !== -1) {\n615\t      // Use existing placeholder\n616\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n617\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n618\t    } else {\n619\t      // Create new with itemId\n620\t      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n621\t      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n622\t    }\n623\t  } else {\n624\t    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n625\t    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n626\t  }\n627\t  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n628\t  renderTranscript();\n629\t  showTranscript();\n630\t  return index;\n631\t};\n632\t\n633\t// Append to streaming response\n634\tconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n635\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n636\t  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n637\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n638\t  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n639\t};\n640\t\n641\t// Finalize streaming response\n642\tconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n643\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n644\t  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n645\t  if (finalContent) {\n646\t    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n647\t  }\n648\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n649\t  streamingResponse = null;\n650\t  renderTranscript();\n651\t};\n652\t\n653\tconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n654\t  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n655\t  if (!container) return;\n656\t\n657\t  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n658\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n659\t    return;\n660\t  }\n661\t\n662\t  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n663\t  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n664\t    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n665\t    if (streamingEl) {\n666\t      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n667\t      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n668\t      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n669\t      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n670\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n671\t      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n672\t      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n673\t      return;\n674\t    }\n675\t  }\n676\t\n677\t  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n678\t  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n679\t  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n680\t\n681\t  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n682\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n683\t    return;\n684\t  }\n685\t\n686\t  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n687\t    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n688\t    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n689\t      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n690\t      try {\n691\t        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n692\t      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n693\t\n694\t      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n695\t\n696\t      // Tool-specific icons\n697\t      const toolIcons = {\n698\t        get_current_weather: '🌤️',\n699\t        web_search: '🔍',\n700\t        web_fetch: '📄',\n701\t        voice_change: '🎙️',\n702\t        save_memory: '💾',\n703\t        recall_memories: '🧠'\n704\t      };\n705\t      const toolIcon = toolIcons[msg.toolName] || '🔧';\n706\t\n707\t      // Format timestamp\n708\t      const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n709\t\n710\t      // Response section inside the expandable body\n711\t      let resultHtml = '';\n712\t      if (msg.result) {\n713\t        resultHtml = `\n714\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n715\t            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n716\t            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n717\t          </div>`;\n718\t      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n719\t        resultHtml = `\n720\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n721\t            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n722\t          </div>`;\n723\t      }\n724\t\n725\t      const justAdded = msg.justAdded ? 'data-just-added=\"true\"' : '';\n726\t      const justCompleted = msg.justCompleted ? 'data-just-completed=\"true\"' : '';\n727\t\n728\t      return `\n729\t        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" ${justAdded} ${justCompleted}>\n730\t          <details class=\"tool-call-details\" ${msg.justAdded ? 'open' : ''}>\n731\t            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n732\t              <span class=\"tool-call-icon ${msg.toolName}\">${toolIcon}</span>\n733\t              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${formatToolName(msg.toolName)}</span>\n734\t              <span class=\"tool-call-timestamp\">${time}</span>\n735\t              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n736\t            </summary>\n737\t            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n738\t              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n739\t                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n740\t                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n741\t              </div>\n742\t              ${resultHtml}\n743\t            </div>\n744\t          </details>\n745\t        </div>\n746\t      `;\n747\t    }\n748\t\n749\t    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'system' : 'assistant';\n750\t    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'System' : 'DUCK-E';\n751\t    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n752\t\n753\t    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n754\t    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n755\t    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n756\t      try {\n757\t        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n758\t      } catch (e) {\n759\t        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n760\t        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n761\t      }\n762\t    } else if (contentHtml) {\n763\t      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n764\t    }\n765\t\n766\t    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n767\t    if (msg.streaming) {\n768\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n769\t    }\n770\t\n771\t    return `\n772\t      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n773\t        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n774\t        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n775\t      </div>\n776\t    `;\n777\t  }).join('');\n778\t\n779\t  container.innerHTML = html;\n780\t\n781\t  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n782\t  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n783\t};\n784\t\n785\t// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\n786\tconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n787\t  try {\n788\t    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ag2client\n789\t    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n790\t\n791\t    // Perf telemetry hooks\n792\t    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n793\t      perfReset();\n794\t      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n795\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n796\t    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n797\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n798\t        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n799\t        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n800\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n801\t      }\n802\t    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n803\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n804\t        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n805\t        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n806\t        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n807\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n808\t      }\n809\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n810\t      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n811\t      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n812\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n813\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n814\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n815\t        const callId = data.call_id;\n816\t        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n817\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n818\t      }\n819\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n820\t      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n821\t        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n822\t        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n823\t          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n824\t          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n825\t          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n826\t        }\n827\t      }\n828\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n829\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n830\t        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n831\t        perfLogSummary();\n832\t      }\n833\t    }\n834\t\n835\t    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n836\t    if (data.type) {\n837\t      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n838\t    }\n839\t\n840\t    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n841\t\n842\t    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n843\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n844\t    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n845\t      const item = data.item;\n846\t      if }\n851\t    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n852\t    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n853\t      if (data.transcript) {\n854\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n855\t        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n856\t        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript, itemId);\n863\t        }\n864\t      }\n865\t    }\n866\t    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n867\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n868\t    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n869\t      if (data.delta) {\n870\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n871\t        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n872\t        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n873\t          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n874\t          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n875\t        }\n876\t        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n877\t      }\n878\t    }\n879\t    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n880\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n881\t    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n882\t      const itemId = data.item_id;\n883\t      if (data.transcript) {\n884\t        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n885\t      }\n886\t      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n887\t        // Assistant's text response DELTA (streaming)\n896\t    else if (data.type === 'response.text.delta') {\n897\t      if (data.delta) {\n898\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n899\t        // Start }\n906\t    }\n907\t    // Assistant's text response completed (for non-audio responses)\n908\t    else if (data.type === 'response.text.done') {\n909\t      const itemId = data.item_id;\n910\t      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'text') {\n911\t        // Finalize with the complete text\n912\t        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.text);\n913\t      } else if (data.text) {\n914\t        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n915\t        console.log('Assistant text:', data.text);\n916\t        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.text, {\n921\t      const name = data.name;\n922\t      const callId = data.call_id;\n923\t      const args = data.arguments;\n924\t      console.log('Tool call:', name, callId, args);\n925\t      addToolCallMessage(name, args, callId);\n926\t    }\n927\t    // Function call output from backend relay - populate tool result on the card\n928\t    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.create'       renderTranscript();\n940\t        // Clear the justCompleted flag after animation\n941\t        setTimeout(() => {\n942\t          if (transcriptMessages[idx]) {\n943\t            transcriptMessages[idx].justCompleted = false;\n944\t          }\n945\t        }, 500);\n946\t      }\n947\t    }\n948\t    // Output item done - mark matching tool call as completed\n949\t    else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n950\t      const item = data.item;\n951\t      if (item && item.type === 'function_call') {\n952\t        const idx = Remove animation flag after a delay\n960\t          setTimeout(() => {\n961\t            const msg = transcriptMessages[idx];\n962\t            if (msg) msg.justCompleted = false;\n963\t          }, 'response.done') {\n969\t      if (streamingResponse) {\n970\t        finalizeStreamingResponse();\n971\t      }\n972\t      if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n973\t        // Accumulate token assistant spoke (skips tool-only turns)\n978\t        if (currentTurnUserTranscript && currentTurnAssistantTranscript &&\n979\t            webRTC?.ws?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {\n980\t          webRTC.ws.send(JSON.stringify({\n981\t            type: 'ducke.turn_done',\n982\t            user_text: currentTurnUserTranscript,\n983\t            assistant_text: OpenAI Realtime API error — surface to transcript so it's visible\n990\t    else if (data.type === 'error') {\n991\t      const errMsg = data.error?.message || JSON.stringify(data.error) || 'Unknown error';\n992\t      console.error('[DUCK-E] Realtime API error:', data.error);\n993\t      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Error: ${errMsg}`);\n994\t    }\n995\t    // Custom transcript message from backend\n996\t    else if (data.type === 'transcript') {\n997\t      addTranscriptMessage(data.role || 'assistant', data.content);\n998\t    }\n999\t    // Voice changed — session reinitialised with new WebRTC peer\n1000\t    else if (data.type === 'ducke.voice_changed') {\n1001\t      const voice = data.voice || 'unknown';\n1002\t      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Voice changed to ${voice}`);\n1003\t    }\n1004\t    // Backend API cost (web_search, memory extraction via gpt-5.4-nano)\n1005\t    else if (data.type === 'ducke.backend_cost') {\n1006\t      if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = Date.now();\n1007\t      sessionCost.backendInputTokens  += data.input_tokens  || 0;\n1008\t      sessionCost.backendOutputTokens += data.output_tokens || 0;\n1009\t      refreshCostDisplay();\n1010\t    }\n1011\t  } catch (e) {\n1012\t    console.error('Error handling WebRTC message:', e);\n1013\t  }\n1014\t};\n1015\t\n1016\t// Function to update the UI elements based on connection status.\n1017\tconst updateUI = (status) => {\n1018\t  // Main controls\n1019\t  const statusIndicator = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator\");\n1020\t  const statusText = document.getElementById(\"status-text\");\n1021\t  const buttonText = document.getElementById(\"button-text\");\n1022\t  const toggleButton = }\n1094\t};\n1095\t\n1096\tconst toggleConnection = async () => {\n1097\t  if (!connectionStatus) {\n1098\t    // User is attempting to connect.\n1099\t    updateUI(\"connecting\");\n1100\t\n1101\t    // Reset cost tracking state for new session\n1102\t    resetCostState();\n1103\t\n1104\t    try {\n1105\t      // Use WebSocket URL with OAuth token if available\n1106\t      const wsUrl = getWebSocketUrl();\n1107\t      webRTC = new ag2client.WebRTC(wsUrl);\n1108\t\n1109\t      // Set up the disconnect callback.\n1110\t      webRTC.onDisconnect = () => {\n1111\t        updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n1112\t        connectionStatus = false;\n1113\t        resetCostState(); // Clear stale cost data on disconnect\n1114\t      };\n1115\t\n1116\t      // Set up message handler for transcript\n1117\t      webRTC.onMessage = handleWebRTCMessage;\n1118\t\n1119\t      await webRTC.connect();\n1120\t\n1121\t      updateUI(\"connected\");\n1122\t      connectionStatus = setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n1128\t      } else if (isMuted) {\n1129\t        // Apply saved mute state\n1130\t        setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n1131\t      }\n1132\t\n1133\t      console.log('Connection established, mic state applied');\n1134\t    } catch (error) {\n1135\t      console.error(\"Connection error:\", error);\n1136\t      updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n1137\t updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n  savePushToTalkState(isPushToTalk);\n  console.log(`Push-to-talk mode toggled to: ${isPushToTalk}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    if (isPushToTalk) {\n      // Entering PTT mode - disable mic by default\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n    } else {\n      // Leaving PTT mode - restore based on mute state\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Push-to-talk button handlers\nconst startTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.add('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.add('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(true);\n  console.log('PTT: Started talking');\n};\n\nconst stopTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.remove('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.remove('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n  console.log('PTT: Stopped talking');\n};\n\n// Update layout based on chat history (desktop: show inline controls when has content)\nconst updateLayoutMode = (hasHistory) => {\n  const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');\n  if (mainContent) {\n    if (hasHistory) {\n      mainContent.classList.add('has-history');\n    } else {\n      mainContent.classList.remove('has-history');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Transcript display functions\nconst showTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n};\n\nconst hideTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\nconst clearTranscript = () => {\n  transcriptMessages = [];\n  renderTranscript();\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\n// Find message by itemId\nconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n};\n\n// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\nconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n  // Check if already exists\n  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    itemId,\n    role,\n    content: '',\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Update message content by itemId\nconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n  if (index !== -1) {\n    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n    }\n    renderTranscript();\n    showTranscript();\n    return index;\n  }\n  return -1;\n};\n\n// Format tool name for display\nconst formatToolName = (name) => {\n  const displayNames = {\n    get_current_weather: 'Weather',\n    web_search: 'Web Search',\n    web_fetch: 'Fetch URL',\n    voice_change: 'Voice Change',\n    save_memory: 'Save Memory',\n    recall_memories: 'Recall Memories'\n  };\n  return displayNames[name] || name.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\\b\\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase());\n};\n\n// Add a tool call message to the transcript\nconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    role: 'tool',\n    type: 'tool_call',\n    toolName: name,\n    toolArgs: args,\n    callId: callId,\n    status: 'pending',\n    result: null,\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    justAdded: true // Flag for initial animation\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Legacy function for messages without itemId\nconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n  if (itemId) {\n    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Update existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n      renderTranscript();\n      showTranscript();\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n  // Fallback: add new message\n  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\nconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n  let index;\n  if (itemId) {\n    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Use existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    } else {\n      // Create new with itemId\n      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n    }\n  } else {\n    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n  }\n  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n  return index;\n};\n\n// Append to streaming response\nconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n};\n\n// Finalize streaming response\nconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n  if (finalContent) {\n    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n  }\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n  streamingResponse = null;\n  renderTranscript();\n};\n\nconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n  if (!container) return;\n\n  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n    if (streamingEl) {\n      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n\n  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n      try {\n        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n\n      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n\n      // Tool-specific icons\n      const toolIcons = {\n        get_current_weather: '🌤️',\n        web_search: '🔍',\n        web_fetch: '📄',\n        voice_change: '🎙️',\n        save_memory: '💾',\n        recall_memories: '🧠'\n      };\n      const toolIcon = toolIcons[msg.toolName] || '🔧';\n\n      // Format timestamp\n      const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n\n      // Response section inside the expandable body\n      let resultHtml = '';\n      if (msg.result) {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n          </div>`;\n      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n          </div>`;\n      }\n\n      const justAdded = msg.justAdded ? 'data-just-added=\"true\"' : '';\n      const justCompleted = msg.justCompleted ? 'data-just-completed=\"true\"' : '';\n\n      return `\n        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" ${justAdded} ${justCompleted}>\n          <details class=\"tool-call-details\" ${msg.justAdded ? 'open' : ''}>\n            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n              <span class=\"tool-call-icon ${msg.toolName}\">${toolIcon}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${formatToolName(msg.toolName)}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-timestamp\">${time}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n            </summary>\n            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n              </div>\n              ${resultHtml}\n            </div>\n          </details>\n        </div>\n      `;\n    }\n\n    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'system' : 'assistant';\n    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'System' : 'DUCK-E';\n    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n\n    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n      try {\n        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      }\n    } else if (contentHtml) {\n      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n    }\n\n    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n    if (msg.streaming) {\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n      </div>\n    `;\n  }).join('');\n\n  container.innerHTML = html;\n\n  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n};\n\n// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\nconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n  try {\n    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ag2client\n    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n\n    // Perf telemetry hooks\n    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n      perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        const callId = data.call_id;\n        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n        perfLogSummary();\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n    if (data.type) {\n      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n    }\n\n    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n\n    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.id && item.role) {\n        console.log('Conversation item created:', item.id, item.role);\n        createMessagePlaceholder(item.id, item.role);\n      }\n    }\n    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset assistant side for new turn\n        if (itemId && findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) {\n          updateMessageByItemId(itemId, data.transcript);\n        } else {\n          // Fallback if no placeholder exists\n          addTranscriptMessage('user', data.transcript, itemId);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n        }\n        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n      const itemId = data.item_id;\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n      }\n      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n        // Finalize with the complete transcript\n        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.transcript);\n      } else if (data.transcript) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant transcript:', data.transcript);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.transcript, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's text response DELTA (streaming)\n    else if (data.type === 'response.text.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'text' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'text';\n        }\n        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's text response completed (for non-audio responses)\n    else if (data.type === 'response.text.done') {\n      const itemId = data.item_id;\n      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'text') {\n        // Finalize with the complete text\n        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.text);\n      } else if (data.text) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant text:', data.text);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.text, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Function call arguments complete - display tool call card in transcript\n    else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      const name = data.name;\n      const callId = data.call_id;\n      const args = data.arguments;\n      console.log('Tool call:', name, callId, args);\n      addToolCallMessage(name, args, callId);\n    }\n    // Function call output from backend relay - populate tool result on the card\n    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.create' && data.item?.type === 'function_call_output') {\n      const callId = data.item.call_id;\n      const output = data.item.output;\n      console.log('Tool result received for call_id:', callId, output);\n      const idx = transcriptMessages.findIndex(\n        msg => msg.type === 'tool_call' && msg.callId === callId\n      );\n      if (idx !== -1) {\n        transcriptMessages[idx].result = output;\n        transcriptMessages[idx].status = 'completed';\n        transcriptMessages[idx].justCompleted = true; // Trigger completion animation\n        renderTranscript();\n        // Clear the justCompleted flag after animation\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          if (transcriptMessages[idx]) {\n            transcriptMessages[idx].justCompleted = false;\n          }\n        }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n    // Output item done - mark matching tool call as completed\n    else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.type === 'function_call') {\n        const idx = transcriptMessages.findIndex(\n          msg => msg.type === 'tool_call' && msg.callId === item.call_id\n        );\n        if (idx !== -1) {\n          transcriptMessages[idx].status = 'completed';\n          transcriptMessages[idx].justCompleted = true; // Flag for completion animation\n          renderTranscript();\n          // Remove animation flag after a delay\n          setTimeout(() => {\n            const msg = transcriptMessages[idx];\n            if (msg) msg.justCompleted = false;\n          }, 1000);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Response cancelled or interrupted - finalize any streaming\n    else if (data.type === 'response.cancelled' || data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (streamingResponse) {\n        finalizeStreamingResponse();\n      }\n      if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n        // Accumulate token costs from response.done usage data\n        if (data.response?.usage) {\n          updateCostFromResponse(data.response.usage);\n        }\n        // Fire memory extraction if assistant spoke (skips tool-only turns)\n        if (currentTurnUserTranscript && currentTurnAssistantTranscript &&\n            webRTC?.ws?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {\n          webRTC.ws.send(JSON.stringify({\n            type: 'ducke.turn_done',\n            user_text: currentTurnUserTranscript,\n            assistant_text: currentTurnAssistantTranscript,\n          }));\n          currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset for next response in same turn\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // OpenAI Realtime API error — surface to transcript so it's visible\n    else if (data.type === 'error') {\n      const errMsg = data.error?.message || JSON.stringify(data.error) || 'Unknown error';\n      console.error('[DUCK-E] Realtime API error:', data.error);\n      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Error: ${errMsg}`);\n    }\n    // Custom transcript message from backend\n    else if (data.type === 'transcript') {\n      addTranscriptMessage(data.role || 'assistant', data.content);\n    }\n    // Voice changed — session reinitialised with new WebRTC peer\n    else if (data.type === 'ducke.voice_changed') {\n      const voice = data.voice || 'unknown';\n      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Voice changed to ${voice}`);\n    }\n    // Backend API cost (web_search, memory extraction via gpt-5.4-nano)\n    else if (data.type === 'ducke.backend_cost') {\n      if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = Date.now();\n      sessionCost.backendInputTokens  += data.input_tokens  || 0;\n      sessionCost.backendOutputTokens += data.output_tokens || 0;\n      refreshCostDisplay();\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('Error handling WebRTC message:', e);\n  }\n};\n\n// Function to update the UI elements based on connection status.\nconst updateUI = (status) => {\n  // Main controls\n  const statusIndicator = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator\");\n  const statusText = document.getElementById(\"status-text\");\n  const buttonText = document.getElementById(\"button-text\");\n  const toggleButton = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection\");\n  const muteBtn = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn\");\n  const pttControls = document.getElementById(\"ptt-controls\");\n  // Inline controls\n  const statusIndicatorInline = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator-inline\");\n  const statusTextInline = document.getElementById(\"status-text-inline\");\n  const buttonTextInline = document.getElementById(\"button-text-inline\");\n  const toggleButtonInline = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection-inline\");\n  const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn-inline\");\n  const pttControlsInline = document.getElementById(\"ptt-controls-inline\");\n\n  // Remove all status classes from both\n  statusIndicator.classList.remove(\"connecting\", \"connected\", \"disconnected\");\n  toggleButton.classList.remove(\"connected\");\n  if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.remove(\"connecting\", \"connected\", \"disconnected\");\n  if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.classList.remove(\"connected\");\n\n  if (status === \"connecting\") {\n    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"connecting\");\n    statusText.textContent = \"Connecting to DUCK-E...\";\n    buttonText.innerHTML = '<span class=\"spinner\"></span>';\n    toggleButton.disabled = true;\n    muteBtn.disabled = true;\n    // Inline\n    if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.add(\"connecting\");\n    if (statusTextInline) statusTextInline.textContent = \"Connecting...\";\n    if (buttonTextInline) buttonTextInline.innerHTML = '<span class=\"spinner\"></span>';\n    if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.disabled = true;\n    if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.disabled = true;\n    // Hide PTT controls while connecting\n    if (pttControls) pttControls.style.display = 'none';\n    if (pttControlsInline) pttControlsInline.style.display = 'none';\n  } else if (status === \"connected\") {\n    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"connected\");\n    statusText.textContent = \"Connected - DUCK-E is listening\";\n    buttonText.textContent = \"Disconnect\";\n    toggleButton.classList.add(\"connected\");\n    toggleButton.disabled = false;\n    muteBtn.disabled = false;\n    // Inline\n    if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.add(\"connected\");\n    if (statusTextInline) statusTextInline.textContent = \"Connected\";\n    if (buttonTextInline) buttonTextInline.textContent = \"Disconnect\";\n    if (toggleButtonInline) {\n      toggleButtonInline.classList.add(\"connected\");\n      toggleButtonInline.disabled = false;\n    }\n    if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.disabled = false;\n    // Show PTT controls when connected\n    if (pttControls) {\n      pttControls.style.display = 'flex';\n      pttControls.classList.remove('disabled');\n    }\n    if (pttControlsInline) pttControlsInline.style.display = 'flex';\n    // Apply saved PTT state now that we're connected\n    updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n  } else if (status === \"disconnected\") {\n    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"disconnected\");\n    statusText.textContent = \"Ready to Connect\";\n    buttonText.textContent = \"Connect\";\n    toggleButton.disabled = false;\n    muteBtn.disabled = false;\n    // Inline\n    if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.add(\"disconnected\");\n    if (statusTextInline) statusTextInline.textContent = \"Ready\";\n    if (buttonTextInline) buttonTextInline.textContent = \"Connect\";\n    if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.disabled = false;\n    if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.disabled = false;\n    // Hide PTT controls when disconnected\n    if (pttControls) pttControls.style.display = 'none';\n    if (pttControlsInline) pttControlsInline.style.display = 'none';\n  }\n};\n\nconst toggleConnection = async () => {\n  if (!connectionStatus) {\n    // User is attempting to connect.\n    updateUI(\"connecting\");\n\n    // Reset cost tracking state for new session\n    resetCostState();\n\n    try {\n      // Use WebSocket URL with OAuth token if available\n      const wsUrl = getWebSocketUrl();\n      webRTC = new ag2client.WebRTC(wsUrl);\n\n      // Set up the disconnect callback.\n      webRTC.onDisconnect = () => {\n        updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n        connectionStatus = false;\n        resetCostState(); // Clear stale cost data on disconnect\n      };\n\n      // Set up message handler for transcript\n      webRTC.onMessage = handleWebRTCMessage;\n\n      await webRTC.connect();\n\n      updateUI(\"connected\");\n      connectionStatus = true;\n\n      // Apply saved states after connection\n      if (isPushToTalk) {\n        // In PTT mode, mic is off by default\n        setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n      } else if (isMuted) {\n        // Apply saved mute state\n        setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n      }\n\n      console.log('Connection established, mic state applied');\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Connection error:\", error);\n      updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n      connectionStatus = false;\n      resetCostState(); // Clear any partial cost state on failed connection\n\n      // Show error notification\n      alert(\"Failed to connect to DUCK-E. Please check your microphone permissions and try again.\");\n    }\n  } else {\n    // User is attempting to disconnect.\n    if (webRTC && typeof webRTC.close === \"function\") {\n      webRTC.close();\n    }\n    updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n    connectionStatus = false;\n    resetCostState(); // Clear stale cost data on manual disconnect\n  }\n};\n\n// Helper to attach PTT button events (mouse and touch)\nconst attachPTTButtonEvents = (btn) => {\n  if (!btn) return;\n  btn.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", startTalking);\n  btn.addEventListener(\"mouseup\", stopTalking);\n  btn.addEventListener(\"mouseleave\", stopTalking);\n  btn.addEventListener(\"touchstart\", (e) => { e.preventDefault(); startTalking(); });\n  btn.addEventListener(\"touchend\", (e) => { e.preventDefault(); stopTalking(); });\n  btn.addEventListener(\"touchcancel\", stopTalking);\n};\n\n// Expose transcript functions globally for Agentation annotation callbacks\nwindow.addTranscriptMessage = addTranscriptMessage;\nwindow.addToolCallMessage = addToolCallMessage;\n\n// Send a structured annotation to the backend via WebSocket.\n// Called by the Agentation onSubmit callback when the user submits feedback.\nwindow.sendAnnotationToBackend = (annotation) => {\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.ws && webRTC.ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {\n    webRTC.ws.send(JSON.stringify({\n      type: 'ducke.annotation',\n      annotation: annotation,\n    }));\n  }\n};\n\ndocument.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", () => {\n  // Log version to console\n  if (typeof APP_VERSION !== 'undefined') {\n    console.log(`%cDUCK-E v${APP_VERSION}`, 'color: #4F46E5; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;');\n    console.log(`%cDigitally Unified Conversational Knowledge Engine`, 'color: #94A3B8; font-size: 11px;');\n  }\n\n  console.log('DOMContentLoaded fired - attaching event listeners');\n\n  // Initialize OAuth state\n  if (typeof OAUTH_CONFIGURED !== 'undefined' && OAUTH_CONFIGURED) {\n    loadOAuthState();\n    updateLoginUI();\n\n    // Add login button event listener\n    const loginBtn = document.getElementById('login-btn');\n    if (loginBtn) {\n      loginBtn.addEventListener('click', handleLogin);\n    }\n\n    // Add logout button event listener\n    const logoutBtn = document.getElementById('logout-btn');\n    if (logoutBtn) {\n      logoutBtn.addEventListener('click', handleLogout);\n    }\n\n    // Check if we're returning from OAuth callback\n    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const accessToken = urlParams.get('access_token');\n    if (accessToken) {\n      // We have a token from OAuth callback\n      console.log('OAuth callback detected, saving token...');\n\n      // Extract user info from URL params (if available)\n      const userParam = urlParams.get('user_info');\n      let user = null;\n      if (userParam) {\n        try {\n          user = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(userParam));\n        } catch (e) {\n          console.error('Failed to parse user info from URL:', e);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Fetch user info from backend if not in URL\n      if (!user) {\n        fetch('/auth/me', {\n          headers: {\n            'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`\n          }\n        })\n          .then(response => {\n            if (response.ok) {\n              return response.json();\n            } else {\n              throw new Error('Token validation failed');\n            }\n          })\n          .then(data => {\n            if (data.authenticated && data.user_info) {\n              saveOAuthState(accessToken, {\n                email: data.user_info.email || 'Authenticated User',\n                name: data.user_info.name || 'User',\n                picture: data.user_info.picture || ''\n              });\n              updateLoginUI();\n            } else {\n              console.error('Token validation returned unexpected data:', data);\n            }\n          })\n          .catch(err => console.error('Failed to verify token:', err));\n      } else {\n        saveOAuthState(accessToken, user);\n        updateLoginUI();\n      }\n\n      // Clean up URL\n      window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, window.location.pathname);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Main controls\n  const toggleButton = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection\");\n  toggleButton.addEventListener(\"click\", toggleConnection);\n\n  const muteBtn = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn\");\n  if (muteBtn) muteBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", toggleMute);\n\n  const pttToggle = document.getElementById(\"ptt-toggle\");\n  if (pttToggle) pttToggle.addEventListener(\"change\", togglePushToTalk);\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById(\"ptt-btn\");\n  attachPTTButtonEvents(pttBtn);\n\n  // Inline controls (desktop - below transcript)\n  const toggleButtonInline = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection-inline\");\n  if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.addEventListener(\"click\", toggleConnection);\n\n  const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn-inline\");\n  if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.addEventListener(\"click\", toggleMute);\n\n  const pttToggleInline = document.getElementById(\"ptt-toggle-inline\");\n  if (pttToggleInline) pttToggleInline.addEventListener(\"change\", togglePushToTalk);\n\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById(\"ptt-btn-inline\");\n  attachPTTButtonEvents(pttBtnInline);\n\n  // Keyboard shortcut for PTT (spacebar when in PTT mode)\n  document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (e) => {\n    if (isPushToTalk && e.code === \"Space\" && !e.repeat && connectionStatus) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      startTalking();\n    }\n  });\n\n  document.addEventListener(\"keyup\", (e) => {\n    if (isPushToTalk && e.code === \"Space\" && connectionStatus) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      stopTalking();\n    }\n  });\n\n  // Attach clear transcript button listener\n  const clearBtn = document.getElementById(\"clear-transcript\");\n  if (clearBtn) {\n    clearBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n      clearTranscript();\n      hideTranscript();\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Load saved preferences\n  isMuted = loadMuteState();\n  isPushToTalk = loadPushToTalkState();\n\n  updateMuteUI(isMuted);\n  updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n\n  // Initialize UI\n  updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n});\n","numLines":1321,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1321}}}
